author: Dr. James Wilson
content:
Telephone encounter with patient and wife Patricia regarding medication management.

REASON FOR CALL: Patient called clinic requesting prior authorization for Entresto (sacubitril/valsartan). Pharmacy reported insurance requires step therapy documentation. Additionally, patient reports mild increase in lower extremity swelling over past 3 days and asks whether he should adjust his furosemide.

MEDICATION ISSUE: Completed prior authorization form for Entresto 97/103mg BID. Documented HFrEF diagnosis with EF 30-35%, prior ACE inhibitor intolerance (lisinopril angioedema), prior ARB use (losartan), and clinical need for ARNI per PARADIGM-HF evidence. Faxed to pharmacy and insurance. Expected turnaround 48-72 hours. Patient has 5-day supply remaining — if PA not approved in time, will provide samples.

VOLUME STATUS CONCERN: Patient reports weight up from 98 to 99.5 kg over past 3 days. Bilateral ankle swelling slightly worse than baseline. No dyspnea at rest, no orthopnea, no PND. Has been adherent with medications and diet — denies high-sodium meals. Per home BP log, readings have been 130-140/80-85. No chest pain, no palpitations.

ASSESSMENT: Mild fluid retention, likely subclinical volume overload. Not in acute decompensation based on history.

PLAN:
1. Add one additional dose of furosemide 40mg this afternoon (in addition to his regular 60mg BID), then increase to 60mg BID + 20mg midday for 3 days as a short course.
2. Monitor daily weights — if weight does not return to <98.5 kg within 3 days, or if dyspnea worsens, patient to call clinic or present to ED.
3. Recheck BMP in 3 days to monitor potassium and creatinine given increased diuresis (lab order placed).
4. Reinforced sodium restriction and fluid limitation to 1.5L daily.
5. Wife Patricia will monitor symptoms and weights.
6. If Entresto PA not approved by Monday, patient to call clinic for bridge supply.
7. Follow-up appointment in cardiology already scheduled for 5/15.

Total call duration: 18 minutes.
attestation:
Telephone encounter documented.

Electronically signed by: Dr. James Wilson
Date: 4/21/2023
